description: CompositionPink round neck shirt made of 100% cotton, engineered with Dri-Fit technology, has short sleeves and graphic print on the frontFitRegularWash careMachine wash cold with like coloursDo not dry clean or bleachTumble dry lowWarm ironCrafted from soft cotton fabric, this t-shirt from nike offers exemplary dry comfort, making it a great everyday choice for your healthy runs and casual days. Team this tee with jeans and running shoes for a sporty look. Add on a hooded sweatshirt for exemplary comfort during winters.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
